config.title: SLUM: The Shadow Library Uptime Monitor
config.description:
This dashboard tracks the availability of popular shadow libraries in real time from a US-based server for informational purposes. We do not endorse these websites and are not responsible for their content. 


[DMCA Compliance Notice](https://open-slum.org/status/dmca)

incident.title: Unstable due to high traffic
incident.content: W're experiencing frequent outages due to high traffic. Please consider unofficial mirror https://open-slum.pages.dev/
